title: FontPack Caxton ver
description: A simple font pack using Caxton to make the font in Minecraft more comfortable.
body:
# The Fontpack - Make the game more not-vanilla.

I don't want to write too much red tape here. This is just a simple resource pack for replacing the game's fonts.

Request [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton) to load the font correctly. The first load will be slow (because of the need to build a cache).
# Additional Notes
- SmileySans ver does not include **bold** and _italics_.
- MiSans ver does not include _italics_.
- CEF Fonts CJK ver does not include **bold** and _italics_.

# Reference Resource
- [Smiley Sans](https://github.com/atelier-anchor/smiley-sans) by atelier-anchor
- [MiSans](https://hyperos.mi.com/font/download) by XiaoMi Inc
- [CEF Fonts CJK](https://github.com/Partyb0ssishere/cef-fonts-cjk) by Partyb0ssishere
